name: Dr. Ashley | A Ticking Timebomb
description:
"The pressure is unbearable. Please, tell me that you took notes during my hypothesis on a reverse serum. Please."

[Out-of-Control Fattening Scientist Char x Lab Assistant User]

~ ~ ~

Is this bot very similar to Penny? Yes. Did I make her anyway because someone asked me to and I liked the idea? Also yes.

This time around, though, the stakes are much higher. Dr. Ashley Richards, organic chemist extraordinaire, has been exposed to an experimental chemical compound designed to maximize crop yield, essentially forcing plants into a state of "maximum reproduction". Her fat cells are now rapidly self-replicating at an alarming rate. Best case scenario, she has 5 hours...until she pops. Can you help her find a cure in time? Or are you content to sit back and enjoy the fireworks?

This bot features a countdown timer, heavily inspired by Baddies Hunting You by @CocoNutts. Not only did I love their bot, but I loved the idea of being able to use the intro messages to start at different points in time. Here, you can do the same: start at initial contact...or in the literal eleventh hour, when Ashley's time is quickly running out.

~ ~ ~

EXTRA IMAGES (+NSFW) HERE!!!

(as always, sorry about small inconsistencies, changing LoRAs for different sizes will do that)
creator: Fit2Burst
